name: Cumin-Scented Corn and Red Pepper Saute
recipeIngredient: 2 red bell peppers, diced into pieces (slightly larger than a corn kernel)
1 small onion, diced into pieces (slightly larger than a corn kernel)
Salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large (12-inch) sauté pan over medium heat, heat the oil and butter.
2. Add the diced bell peppers and onion and cook until the bell peppers have softened and the onions are beginning to brown lightly, about 8 minutes.
3. Add the cumin, salt, and pepper to taste and stir for 1 minute.
4. Add the corn and cook for 3 to 4 minutes until the corn is heated through.
5. Remove from heat, mix in the cilantro, and serve.
